## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows `<type>/<slug>` (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] PR title matches the squash-merge commit format
- [ ] Local checks pass: `uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check . && uv run pytest`
- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] Reviewed by at least one teammate
